sql.query: SELECT COUNT(*) AS totalTasks,COUNT(CASE WHEN t.status NOT IN ('complete','skipped','cancelled') THEN 1 END) AS openTasks,COUNT(CASE WHEN t.status NOT IN ('complete','skipped','cancelled') AND t.dueDate<CURRENT_TIMESTAMP THEN 1 END) AS overdueTasks,COUNT(CASE WHEN t.status NOT IN ('complete','skipped','cancelled') AND t.dueDate BETWEEN CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AND DATE_ADD(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,INTERVAL 7 DAY) THEN 1 END) AS dueSoonTasks,COUNT(CASE WHEN t.status NOT IN ('complete','skipped','cancelled') AND t.assignedToUserId=:userId THEN 1 END) AS myTasks,COUNT(CASE WHEN t.status NOT IN ('complete','skipped','cancelled') AND t.assignedToUserId IS NULL AND t.assignedToTeamId IS NULL AND t.assignedToRoleId IS NULL THEN 1 END) AS unassignedTasks,COUNT(CASE WHEN t.completedDate>=DATE_SUB(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,INTERVAL 30 DAY) THEN 1 END) AS completedLast30Days FROM tbl_tasks t WHERE t.tenantId=:tenantId

SELECT t.id,t.workflowId,t.workflowStageId,t.taskName,t.description,t.status,t.priority,t.isRequired,t.dueDate,t.startedDate,t.completedDate,w.workflowName,w.referenceCode,ws.stageName,COALESCE(u.displayName,tm.teamName,r.roleName,'Unassigned') AS assigneeName,CASE WHEN t.assignedToUserId IS NOT NULL THEN 'user' WHEN t.assignedToTeamId IS NOT NULL THEN 'team' WHEN t.assignedToRoleId IS NOT NULL THEN 'role' ELSE 'unassigned' END AS assigneeType,CASE WHEN t.dueDate<CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AND t.status NOT IN ('complete','skipped','cancelled') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS isOverdue,CAST(COUNT(DISTINCT dep.id) AS UNSIGNED) AS dependencyCount,CAST(COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN blocker.status<>'complete' THEN dep.id END) AS UNSIGNED) AS incompleteBlockerCount FROM tbl_tasks t INNER JOIN tbl_workflows w ON w.id=t.workflowId AND w.tenantId=t.tenantId LEFT JOIN tbl_workflow_stages ws ON ws.id=t.workflowStageId AND ws.tenantId=t.tenantId LEFT JOIN tbl_users u ON u.id=t.assignedToUserId LEFT JOIN tbl_teams tm ON tm.id=t.assignedToTeamId AND tm.tenantId=t.tenantId LEFT JOIN tbl_roles r ON r.id=t.assignedToRoleId LEFT JOIN tbl_task_dependencies dep ON dep.taskId=t.id AND dep.tenantId=t.tenantId LEFT JOIN tbl_tasks blocker ON blocker.id=dep.dependsOnTaskId AND blocker.tenantId=t.tenantId WHERE t.tenantId=:tenantId AND (t.status NOT IN ('complete','skipped','cancelled') OR t.completedDate>=DATE_SUB(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,INTERVAL 30 DAY)) GROUP BY t.id ORDER BY CASE WHEN t.status NOT IN ('complete','skipped','cancelled') THEN 0 ELSE 1 END,isOverdue DESC,t.dueDate IS NULL,t.dueDate,t.priority='urgent' DESC,t.id DESC LIMIT 250
